subcodes.first_line: O seeker of truth! Thy letter hath been received, and its contents testify that thou art searching for divine truth [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای تشنه حقیقت نامه رسید مضمون دلیل بر آن بود که جستجوی آاین الهی می نماای و
subcodes.subjects: @being a source of light; guidance, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @spiritual transformation, @condition of search, @teaching the Cause; call to teach
